revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Request quotation span}} begin-->{{Fix-span |content={{{text|{{{1|<includeonly>{{main other|Categ...'
Copying from [[Category:S needing substitution checking]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Request quotation span}} begin-->{{Fix-span |content={{{text|{{{1|<includeonly>{{main other|}}{{error|This template '''must''' be used with a non-empty {{para|text}} parameter!}}</includeonly><noinclude>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</noinclude>}}}}}} |link=Wikipedia:Verifiability |text=need quotation to verify |title=Quotation needed from source to verify. |date={{{date|}}} |cat-date=Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification }}<!--{{Request quotation span}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages using span cleanup templates without text|{{NAMESPACE}} {{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTRequest quotation span]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Request quotation span}} begin-->{{Fix-span |content={{{text|{{{1|<includeonly>{{main other|}}{{error|This template '''must''' be used with a non-empty {{para|text}} parameter!}}</includeonly><noinclude>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</noinclude>}}}}}} |link=Wikipedia:Verifiability |text=need quotation to verify |title=Quotation needed from source to verify. |date={{{date|}}} |cat-date=Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification }}<!--{{Request quotation span}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Pages using span cleanup templates without text|{{NAMESPACE}} {{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTRequest quotation span]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
